title: CS2!
description: A CS2 Pack That Replicates CS2 In Minecraft
body:
# A CS2 Modpack
(Replacates CS2 In Minecraft)\
This CS2 Modpack Is To Be Played With Friends And To Have Fun Like The Actual CS2 Game You Can Join The Discord To Find People To Play With And Find Maps!
## [Discord](https://discord.gg/gaWywtDn)
